web_results.title: Next President of Vietnam Predictions & Odds | Polymarket
web_results.description: Phạm Minh Chính · $230,725 Vol. <1% Buy Yes 0.1¢Buy No 0.0¢ · Vietnam’s President is selected through internal decisions of the Communist Party of Vietnam and its National Assembly. The Party is holding its 14th National Congress from January 19 to January 25, 2026, after which the National Assembly of Vietnam is expected to elect leadership positions including President.

web_results.title: President of Vietnam - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Four persons served concurrently as head of both the party and state: Hồ Chí Minh (1951–1969), Trường Chinh (1986), Nguyễn Phú Trọng (2018–2021), and Tô Lâm (2024).

web_results.title: Vietnam’s new leadership slate
web_results.description: A new state president and party general secretary have been appointed following the death of long-time leader Nguyễn Phú Trọng in July 2024. The takeover of Vietnamese politics by the security forces has several implications.

web_results.title: Lương Cường - Wikipedia
web_results.description: Lương Cường (Vietnamese pronunciation: [lɯɤŋ˧˧ kɯɤŋ˨˩]; born 15 August 1957) is a Vietnamese politician and former army general who is currently serving as the 14th president of Vietnam since October 2024.

web_results.title: Vietnam Communist Party elects To Lam chief for 5 more years - Nikkei Asia
web_results.description: HANOI -- Vietnam's ruling Communist Party on Friday elected To Lam as its chief in a vote, while incumbent Prime Minister Pham Minh Chinh and President Luong Cuong are set to be replaced in a few months.

news_results.title: The Future of Sino-Vietnamese Relations post-14th National Congress - Brian Wong - CHINA US Focus
news_results.description: After decades of development and growth, Vietnam seems poised to enter a new chapter of dynamic economic growth, but at a time when the U.S. is teetering on losing global standing, how will Vietnam’s future play out?

news_results.title: Vietnam’s Leader Has New Power, and He’s in a Hurry - The New York Times
news_results.description: To Lam is a former security chief who carved his way to prominence and relishes the good life. He has promised to make Communist Vietnam rich and influential.

news_results.title: Candidates for the National Assembly and People's Council of Ho Chi Minh City meet with voters in the oil and gas industry.
news_results.description: On the morning of February 25th, a meeting was held in Tam Thang ward, Ho Chi Minh City, to connect voters with candidates for the 16th National Assembly and the 11th Ho Chi Minh City People's Council, for the 2026-2031 term.

news_results.title: PM urges swift post-Tet action to secure growth, stability, social security | Vietnam+ (VietnamPlus)
news_results.description: Prime Minister Pham Minh Chinh has issued a directive urging ministries, sectors and localities to swiftly resume work after the Lunar New Year (Tet) holiday, focusing on facilitating production and growth, and ensuring stability, security and social welfare amid complex global developments.

news_results.title: Chặng cuối quyền lực của ông Phạm Minh Chính - BBC News Tiếng Việt
news_results.description: Sau cuộc bầu cử đại biểu Quốc hội khóa 16 dự kiến diễn ra ngày 15/3/2026, Quốc hội sẽ tiến hành kiện toàn bộ máy và bầu Thủ tướng Chính phủ nhiệm kỳ 2026–2031 theo quy trình nhân sự.

result.query: Will Phạm Minh Chính be the next President of Vietnam?
